race.comment: ALL TOO FOXY (8) continued her strong run of recent form when she closed well to get up for third last start over 1120m at Lismore. Failed when extended to 1400m in October but it was at the end of a prep. Drawn to enjoy a nice run and she is worth the gamble out to this trip. JADE TREES (3) led all the way for a comfortable maiden win over 1200m at Coffs Harbour last time out. Lightly raced four-year-old who should have no trouble with an extra 100m today. Big chance to go back-to-back. CONSTELLATION (5) led all the way to collect his maiden win at Lismore two back. Showed pace but was no match for Fabulantes and others at Doomben last time. Back in grade and can improve sharply. THE ROOKIE (7) won her maiden at Grafton three back and has been competitive since. Genuine filly who will give 100% as always. DARLING TAKE CARE (9) is getting down in the weights and saves her best for Ballina.
